title: scope_contract record
description: The UPSTREAM typed research contract (objective + evaluation plan) the idea/baseline/experiment stages must proceed from. The typed content lives in the `contract` object; `scope validate` computes the validator-owned `valid` flag (the author cannot self-certify, force=0 on write). In bound mode idea selection requires a valid scope contract. Required content (validated by `scope validate`, all but objective/primary_metric/metric_direction waivable via contract.waivers{field: reason}): objective, research_question, non_goals, primary_metric, metric_direction, dataset, split, eval_protocol, false_progress_signals, baseline_route_expectation, acceptance_criteria; constraints optional.

contract.description: Typed objective + eval-contract: objective, research_question, non_goals, primary_metric, metric_direction, dataset, split, eval_protocol, false_progress_signals, baseline_route_expectation, acceptance_criteria, constraints; waivers{field: reason} intentionally defers waivable fields.
